task_7.title: Attachment + MultimodalInputBar + ThumbnailStrip + Photo Picker + ChatViewModel attachments state

app/src/main/kotlin/app/sanctum/machina/.note: Has ChatInputRow composable with OutlinedTextField + IconButton (send/stop). Replacing/augmenting it with MultimodalInputBar + ThumbnailStrip is realistic. No attachment concept currently.

No attachment state, no addImages/removeAttachment methods, no snackbar/SharedFlow. All must be added from scratch. send() already has images/audioClips parameters wired to LlmModelHelper.runInference() but passes emptyList() — attaching real data here is straightforward.

app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml.note: Missing all attachment-related strings (snackbar limit message, content descriptions). Additions are straightforward.

files_to_create.app/src/main/kotlin/app/sanctum/machina/: Does not exist. Clean new file.
Does not exist. Clean new file.
Does not exist. Clean new file.

gallery-source/Android/src/app/src/main/.note: Rich reference. Shows PickMultipleVisualMedia (without maxItems — just ImageOnly filter), decodeSampledBitmapFromUri, thumbnail strip with horizontal scroll, conditional camera/gallery/audio buttons. Task spec's PickMultipleVisualMedia(maxItems=10) differs slightly from gallery which uses PickMultipleVisualMedia() (no maxItems cap in launcher). The 10-image cap is enforced in addImages() logic — correct.

issues.item: CameraX deps (camera-core, camera-camera2, camera-lifecycle, camera-view) are NOT in libs.versions.toml and NOT in app/build.gradle.kts. Task 6 is supposed to add them, but this is a hard dependency for Task 8 (CameraBottomSheet) and indirectly relevant to Task 7's camera button. MultimodalInputBar's camera button can exist without CameraX if it just triggers a boolean state, but the actual preview depends on Task 8.
issues.action: Verify Task 6 adds CameraX to build catalog before executing Task 7.

issues.item: PickMultipleVisualMedia(maxItems=10): The gallery source uses PickMultipleVisualMedia() with no maxItems — the constructor variant with maxItems requires activity 1.7+ and API 33+. minSdk=31 so fallback behavior on API 31-32 means the picker may not enforce the limit; the addImages() cap handles this correctly per implementation hints.
issues.action: None — task already documents this correctly in implementation hints.

issues.item: model.llmSupportImage / model.llmSupportAudio flags exist on Model data class in core-runtime. ChatViewModel.kt currently gets the Model from registry.getModel(modelName) in send(). For MultimodalInputBar to receive these capability flags, the model must be exposed as state or passed as param. ChatViewModel does not currently expose a StateFlow<Model>.
issues.action: Task 7 needs to add a way to expose model capabilities (e.g., StateFlow<ModelCapabilities> or pass flags via ChatUiState.Ready). This is not mentioned explicitly in task details — minor gap in spec.

issues.item: Snackbar mechanism: ChatViewModel has no SharedFlow for snackbar events. ModelManagerViewModel uses MutableSharedFlow<NavEvent> as pattern reference. Task specifies SharedFlow<String> — pattern exists in the project, feasible to add.
issues.action: None — implementer should follow ModelManagerViewModel pattern.

issues.item: ErrorLog.e() is a suspend function (requires coroutine context). Usage in ChatViewModel already wraps it in viewModelScope.launch{}. This pattern must be replicated for addImages() error path.
issues.action: None — pattern is established in ChatViewModel.

app/src/main/kotlin/app/sanctum/machina/.note: Needs trigger state for CameraBottomSheet. ReadyContent signature must be extended to pass camera-related callbacks or a camera-trigger flag.

files_to_create.app/src/main/kotlin/app/sanctum/machina/: Does not exist. Clean new file.

gallery-source/Android/src/app/src/main/.note: Uses ImageAnalysis (continuous frame analysis), NOT ImageCapture. The task requires ImageCapture.takePicture() for single-shot photo. The real camera capture pattern is in MessageInputText.kt (showCameraCaptureBottomSheet block) which uses ImageCapture + OnImageCapturedCallback. LiveCameraView.kt is a weaker reference for this specific use case.

issues.item: CameraX dependencies (camera-core, camera-camera2, camera-lifecycle, camera-view) are NOT present in gradle/libs.versions.toml or app/build.gradle.kts. This task cannot be built without them. They must be added before this task executes (Task 6 dependency).
issues.action: Block Task 8 until Task 6 confirms CameraX is in build catalog.

issues.item: LiveCameraView.kt reference (task instruction step 1) uses ImageAnalysis for continuous streaming, not ImageCapture for single-shot. The correct pattern for takePicture() is in MessageInputText.kt (lines 714-883). Task description correctly describes takePicture() but points to wrong primary reference file.
issues.action: Implementer should treat MessageInputText.kt's camera bottom sheet block as the primary pattern reference alongside LiveCameraView.kt.

issues.item: Task references ProcessCameraProvider.awaitInstance() — this is a suspend extension from camera-lifecycle:1.4+. The gallery-source uses it. Must verify version added in Task 6 supports awaitInstance.

viewModel.addImage(bitmap) referenced in task — this is a new method that Task 7 should establish as addImages(uris). Task 8 passes a Bitmap directly (from camera capture, no URI). The task correctly notes addImage(bitmap) singular. ChatViewModel will need both URI-based (Task 7) and Bitmap-based (Task 8) paths for adding images.
issues.action: Task 7 may need to expose an addImageBitmap(bitmap: Bitmap) method in addition to addImages(uris). Minor coordination gap between tasks 7 and 8.

issues.item: ErrorLog.e('camera', ...) — ErrorLog exists, is a @Singleton injected via Hilt. CameraBottomSheet is a Composable, not a ViewModel. To call errorLog.e(), the composable needs a ViewModel reference. Pattern: pass a lambda from the calling ViewModel.
issues.action: CameraBottomSheet should accept onError: suspend (String) -> Unit lambda, called from ChatViewModel scope. Or pass viewModel reference. This must be designed carefully.

app/src/main/kotlin/app/sanctum/machina/.note: Same pattern as Task 8 integration — add mic button, trigger AudioRecorderBottomSheet.
addAudio(pcm: ByteArray, durationMs: Long) method missing — must be added. Attachment infrastructure from Task 7 is prerequisite.

files_to_create.app/src/main/kotlin/app/sanctum/machina/: Does not exist. Clean new file.

gallery-source/Android/src/app/src/main/.note: Good pattern reference. Shows AudioRecord(MIC, SAMPLE_RATE, CHANNEL_IN_MONO, ENCODING_PCM_16BIT, minBufferSize), ByteArrayOutputStream accumulation, coroutineScope{launch(Dispatchers.IO){...}} loop, DisposableEffect cleanup (audioRecordState.value?.release()), auto-stop on MAX_AUDIO_CLIP_DURATION_SEC. Does NOT use LifecycleEventEffect(ON_PAUSE) — that's new to this task.

issues.item: LifecycleEventEffect is from androidx.lifecycle:lifecycle-runtime-compose. The library IS in build.gradle.kts (libs.androidx.lifecycle.runtime.compose, lifecycle version 2.8.7). LifecycleEventEffect was introduced in lifecycle-runtime-compose 2.7.0, so it is available.
AudioRecord requires RECORD_AUDIO permission. minSdk=31 so no pre-Marshmallow concerns. Permission flow with rememberLauncherForActivityResult is available via existing activity-compose dependency.

Gallery's AudioRecorderPanel does NOT check STATE_INITIALIZED after creating AudioRecord — it just calls startRecording() directly. Task spec requires this check (R9 MIUI/HarmonyOS compatibility). Implementer must add this check on top of the gallery pattern.
issues.action: Implementer must explicitly check recorder.state == AudioRecord.STATE_INITIALIZED after creation.

issues.item: ErrorLog.e('audio', ...) same concern as Task 8: ErrorLog is a suspend fun and a Hilt singleton. AudioRecorderBottomSheet is a Composable. Needs lambda or ViewModel reference to call it from IO coroutine.
issues.action: Same pattern resolution as Task 8: pass onError lambda from ViewModel.

issues.item: Gallery AudioRecorderPanel uses SAMPLE_RATE constant from data package (com.google.ai.edge.gallery.data.SAMPLE_RATE). The task spec calls for 16000 Hz. Need to define a local constant in the app module.
issues.action: Define AUDIO_SAMPLE_RATE = 16000 in a constants file or within the bottom sheet.

issues.item: Task says mic button disabled when Audio attachment already exists (AC-20). This requires ChatScreen to observe attachments StateFlow from ChatViewModel (Task 7). Sequential dependency is correct — Task 9 depends on Task 8 which depends on Task 7.

global_findings.item: CameraX libraries (camera-core, camera-camera2, camera-lifecycle, camera-view) are absent from the project's gradle/libs.versions.toml and app/build.gradle.kts. Tasks 7 (camera button) and 8 (CameraBottomSheet) cannot compile without them. This should be resolved in Task 6 per task dependency declarations.

ChatViewModel currently does not expose model capability flags (llmSupportImage, llmSupportAudio) as observable state. MultimodalInputBar needs these to conditionally show buttons. Task 7 spec mentions conditional visibility 'по model.llmSupportImage / model.llmSupportAudio' but ChatViewModel has no such StateFlow. Implementer must add this (e.g., expose as part of ChatUiState.Ready or a separate StateFlow<ModelCapabilities>).

Task 8's primary reference file (LiveCameraView.kt) demonstrates ImageAnalysis for continuous frame streaming, NOT ImageCapture for single-shot. The relevant pattern for takePicture() exists in MessageInputText.kt (camera bottom sheet block, lines 714-883). Spec description is accurate but reference file is partially misleading.

Task 7 defines addImages(uris: List<Uri>) for photo picker. Task 8 needs to add a captured Bitmap directly (no URI). These are separate flows — addImages() decodes URIs; camera capture produces a Bitmap. ChatViewModel needs both paths. Spec gap: Task 7 should explicitly plan for a addImageBitmap(bitmap: Bitmap) method (or a unified addImages overload) that Task 8 will use.

ErrorLog is a suspend function injected as Hilt @Singleton into ViewModels. Bottom sheet Composables (CameraBottomSheet, AudioRecorderBottomSheet) cannot inject it directly. Correct pattern: ViewModel exposes a suspend lambda or the composable calls a ViewModel method that internally calls errorLog.e(). This pattern is established (ChatViewModel.onError block). Implementers must follow this — not attempt to inject ErrorLog into Composables.

PickMultipleVisualMedia(maxItems = 10) requires activity 1.7.0+ (minSdk API 33 for native enforcement, API 31 falls back to system chooser without maxItems). Current activityCompose version is 1.10.1 — the API is available. The 10-item cap in addImages() is the reliable safety net.

summary.task_7: FEASIBLE — all modify/read files exist, patterns are solid. Key gap: model capability flags not yet exposed as observable state in ChatViewModel. Minor snackbar SharedFlow needs to be added.
summary.task_8: FEASIBLE_WITH_CAVEATS — primary blocker is missing CameraX dependencies (must come from Task 6). Reference file LiveCameraView.kt is a weaker pattern match for ImageCapture; MessageInputText.kt is the better reference. Camera bitmap → ViewModel path needs explicit planning.
summary.task_9: FEASIBLE — all dependencies (AudioRecord, LifecycleEventEffect, permission APIs) are available. Gallery's AudioRecorderPanel is an accurate reference. STATE_INITIALIZED check is missing from gallery pattern and must be added explicitly.
